name: Chocolate Madeleines
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Unsalted Butter, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Butter 30 madeleine molds.
3. Melt chocolate in the top of a double boiler set over hot water. Stir in the melted butter.
4. Mix together the flour, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl.
5. In a large bowl, beat eggs at room temperature until light and lemon-colored. Add vanilla.
6. Gradually add sugar, beating constantly at high speed for 5 minutes.
7. Reduce the speed to medium and beat until the mixture has quadrupled in volume, about 5 more minutes.
8. Gently fold in the flour mixture, then the chocolate.
9. Place about 1 tablespoon of batter in the center of each mold.
10. Bake exactly 12 minutes. (Madeleines should be moist and fudgy in the center.)
11. Cool on a rack.
12. Dust with powdered sugar before serving. (Can be prepared up to 1 day ahead. Store in an airtight container.)
